   e) Final cost breakdown:

   - Confirm specific health concerns (stress-related issues) details and adult children coverage requirements from the internal records.

The next steps will be to request the specific details from the {environment} related to current insurance policies and to contact the {external_agent} for proposals covering improved health, property, travel, and additional executive insurance services while factoring in company benefits.
